title: High Fashion Advertisement Photo

imagePrompts.prompt: Create high-fashion advertisement photo. Theme: High-fashion smartphone advertisement photo for a fictional premium device. Subject: Adult fashion model in oversized graphic hoodie holding the phone to cover one eye, phone back facing camera. Composition: Portrait 3:4 commercial framing, solid color background, centered logo/title zone and bold bottom campaign line. Style system: Luxury tech editorial campaign, dramatic studio lighting, ultra-sharp commercial photography, professional color grading. Typography: Clean fictional brand badge at top and short product claim at bottom, readable and restrained. Restrictions: Use fictional phone brand and fictional camera system only; no OPPO, Hasselblad, Apple, Samsung, real logos, or copied device design. Fictional Phone: Aureon V9 Ultra in moon-silver glass. Model Styling: adult model in deep teal oversized hoodie with black-white stripe accents. Background Color: deep midnight teal. Campaign Line: AUREON V9 ULTRA — SEE THE NIGHT CLEARLY.
